title: Self Adhesive P Strip Draught Excluder 5m – EPDM Rubber Weather Seal for Doors & Windows – Seals Gaps 2-5mm – Energy Saving Draft Stopper (Brown)
features: STRONG SELF-ADHESIVE BACKING – Easy to install with no tools required; the high-tack adhesive ensures long-lasting hold on doors and windows.
PREMIUM EPDM RUBBER – Made from closed-cell EPDM rubber that will not absorb moisture, sag, or lose shape over time.
SEALS GAPS 2-5MM – Effectively blocks draughts, dust, noise, and insects by sealing small to medium gaps.
ENERGY SAVING SOLUTION – Keeps heat inside your home, reducing energy loss by up to 35% and lowering heating bills.
FLEXIBLE 5M ROLL – Supplied in a convenient 5-meter length, suitable for all standard windows and doors.
description: Keep your home warm, quiet, and energy-efficient with the Exitex Self Adhesive P Strip Draught Excluder. Made from durable closed-cell EPDM rubber, this high-quality seal is designed to prevent draughts, dust, and noise from entering through gaps around doors and windows. The strong self-adhesive backing makes installation quick and hassle-free, with no tools required. Each 5-meter roll is flexible and easy to cut to size, ensuring a precise fit for a wide range of applications. Suitable for sealing gaps of 2–5mm, this draught excluder helps reduce heat loss by up to 35%, lowering energy bills while improving comfort in your home. A simple yet effective solution to keep your living spaces insulated all year round.
